subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The detailed letter which thou hadst composed and addressed to Jinab-i-Manshadi hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مفصل که بجناب منشادی انشا و انشاد نموده بودی واصل گردید
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @love of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @sacred remains; burial of the Bab, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
